title: astragalus angreni
intro: Astragalus angreni, also known as the Angren milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus angreni include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections. Astragalus angreni can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
